note: Frozen data for the external head-to-head. corpus/queries mirror bench/dataset.ts; conflictPairs mirror bench/consistency-dataset.ts. Regenerate with `npm run bench:export`.

corpus.content: Sales invoice INV-2043 issued by Acme Foods to Northwind Traders on 2026-03: €18,400 for a wholesale grocery order, payable within 30 days.
Sales invoice INV-2051 issued by Acme Foods to Meridian Cafés on 2026-04: €9,250, paid on receipt.
Purchase invoice PINV-771 from packaging supplier BoxLine to Helios Retail on 2026-02: €6,300 for shipping cartons, net 45 days.
Purchase invoice PINV-802 from wholesaler GrainCo to Acme Foods on 2026-03: €12,900 for raw materials.
Purchase order PO-5590 from Acme Foods to GrainCo on 2026-03: 12 tonnes of flour at €1,075 per tonne, total €12,900.
Sales order SO-330 from Meridian Cafés to Acme Foods on 2026-04: a recurring monthly pastry supply worth €9,250.
Customer payment received by Acme Foods from Northwind Traders on 2026-04: €18,400 by bank transfer, settling sales invoice INV-2043.
Supplier payment by Helios Retail to BoxLine on 2026-03: €6,300 clearing purchase invoice PINV-771.
Bank statement for Helios Retail, 2026-02: opening balance €31,200, closing balance €19,700, across 14 transactions.
Bank transfer out of ByteCraft Software on 2026-05: €4,800 to CloudHost for annual server hosting.
Office rent for Acme Foods in 2026-03: €4,100 paid by bank transfer to the landlord.
Electricity expense for Acme Foods in 2026-04: €1,250, recorded under utilities.
ByteCraft Software purchased laptops for €21,900 in 2026-05 — a capital expense, not an operating cost.
Sales target for Acme Foods in 2026-Q2 is €95,000 in revenue; actual through 2026-04 stands at €61,300, about 65% of target.
P&L for Helios Retail in 2026-02: revenue €44,000, cost of goods sold €22,500, operating expenses €13,800, net profit €7,700.
P&L for ByteCraft Software in 2026-05: revenue €210,000, operating profit €41,200.
ByteCraft Software's 2026-05 EBITDA was €38,400 on revenue of €210,000, an 18.3% margin.
Cash position for Acme Foods at the end of 2026-04: €27,600 across two bank accounts, down €3,400 from the prior month.
Workforce cost for Acme Foods in 2026-03: 3 employees, gross €52,000, true employer cost €63,800, net paid from bank €41,000.

The €41,000 salary transfer at Acme Foods for 2026-03 understates the true cost of employing the team by €22,800 — mostly employer social-security contributions of €11,800 that never appear on the bank statement.
Across all clients, statutory employer contributions add roughly 28% on top of the net salary that leaves the bank account — a routinely under-counted cost.

Completeness check for Helios Retail 2026-02: a €3,200 bank payment to Pallas Freight has no matching purchase invoice (high severity) — either the supplier never sent it, the accountant never recorded it, or the payment is wrong.
Completeness check for Acme Foods 2026-04: sales order SO-330 has no matching sales invoice yet, so €9,250 of revenue may be unrecorded.
Consistency check for ByteCraft Software 2026-05: VAT on three sales invoices was recorded at 13% but the standard rate is 24% — the invoices need correcting.
Reconciliation for Acme Foods 2026-03: purchase order PO-5590, purchase invoice PINV-802 and the supplier payment all agree at €12,900 — three-way match passed.
User preference: every summary should open with the consolidated P&L and cash position, then flag any missing or inconsistent documents.
User preference: report all amounts in euros rounded to the nearest hundred, and always quote the period-over-period change when a prior period exists.
User preference: treat any bank payment without a matching invoice as high severity and surface it at the top of the review.
General note: a purchase order is only a commitment to buy; it becomes a recorded cost when the matching invoice is received and approved.
Glossary: 'employer cost' means gross salary plus the employer's own social-security contribution — the real cost of employing someone.
A supplier statement from GrainCo showed €12,900 outstanding in 2026-03 — the same figure as invoice PINV-802, but a summary reminder, not a new charge.
Northwind Traders requested a €18,400 quote in 2026-02 for a possible order that was never placed — no invoice resulted.

queries.text: Where might revenue be slipping through unbilled?
What does it truly cost us to keep someone on the team beyond their take-home pay?
Are we on track to hit our revenue goal this quarter?
How profitable was the software company last month?
How does the owner want the report laid out?
Was there a bank payment with no matching invoice at Helios Retail, and how serious is it?
What is the off-bank employer-cost gap at Acme Foods for 2026-03?
Did the flour purchase from GrainCo fully reconcile?
How much cash did Acme Foods hold at the end of April 2026?
In what currency and rounding should amounts be reported?

a.content: Customer CUST-77 has a credit limit of 5000 euros.

b.content: Customer CUST-77 has a credit limit of 8000 euros.

a.content: Purchase order PO-5590 is for a quantity of 12 tonnes.

b.content: Purchase order PO-5590 is for a quantity of 15 tonnes.

a.content: Vendor BoxLine account status is active.

b.content: Vendor BoxLine account status is suspended.

retrievalProbe.question: What is the amount on invoice INV-2043?
What is the total value of purchase order PO-5590?
What is the amount on purchase invoice PINV-771?
How much cash did Acme Foods hold at end of 2026-04?
